title: Epitaph - On Himself
content:
Nobles and Heralds, by your leave!
Here lie the bones of Matthew Prior;
A son of Adam and Eve:
Let Bourbon or Nassau go higher.
meaning:
Matthew Prior's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Epitaph - On Himself"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
